{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322053548960947898DE27C2BF4B8"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613277501264741182","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看越看越喜欢故事情节引人入胜捧棒棒哒[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772609808,"group_id":"7597332286287121432","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+4e02SWiVFCm/sx4M8zx58=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"624983612863203","user_name":"爱吃白莲蓉的刘雅茹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"624983612863203","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597332286287121432","book_info":{"abstract":"重生2002年，苏晨从宿醉中醒来，面对的是家徒四壁的破石头房，和大哥失望透顶的眼神。
上一世，他退学、酗酒、败光家产，让大哥打了一辈子光棍，最后冻死街头。
这一世，浪子回头，【海洋猎人系统】觉醒！
运气值+999？一铲子下去，全是极品响螺！
扫描范围500米？大海在他眼里就是透明的鱼缸！
村民嘲笑他是废物？苏晨默默提起水桶，反手就是一网千斤大黄鱼。
看着满院子的生猛海鲜，苏晨对目瞪口呆的大哥说：“哥，把那工地活辞了吧，咱家以后拿龙虾喂猪！”
且看苏晨如何靠着一把沙铲，撬动整片海洋，铸就一段渔村传奇！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4abd9c6eda338ee9a35d2a2d5df1bc24","author":"荒野至上","author_id":"","book_id":"7597332286287121432","book_name":"赶海：浪子回头，从赶海开始暴富","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#70c8e8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4329人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":40,"name":"海岛","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=40&name=海岛&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7597332331321377304","read_count":"4329","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"348019"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"149","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,都市异能,海岛,重生,乡村,系统,钓鱼,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o8c4473a3683fe06eebf128a97a742437~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312948&x-signature=oTLO7%2FXoED01XHZtb3C71uk%2BrbM%3D","tomato_book_status
